_note: Run scripts/ops/edge-coverage-report.ts --days 30 --json --out this-file.json against live DB post-deploy to populate real numbers. Pre-deploy baseline from 12,043-pick audit is embedded in the report tool itself.
postDeployTarget: realEdgePct should trend upward as new picks with real market data are submitted under the fixed scoring engine
toolCommand: source local.env && export SUPABASE_URL SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY && npx tsx scripts/ops/edge-coverage-report.ts --days 30 --json --out docs/06_status/proof/UTV2-985/edge-coverage-report.json
